creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
# df -h
Filesystem     Size    Used   Avail Capacity  Mounted on
/dev/ad2s1a      1G    210M    716M    23%    /
devfs          1.0k    1.0k      0B   100%    /dev
/dev/ad2s1e      1G     13M    913M     1%    /tmp
/dev/ad2s1f     39G     26G     10G    72%    /usr
/dev/ad2s1d    5.8G    866M    4.5G    16%    /var
/dev/ad2s1g    242G    296M    222G     0%    /usr/sharedzone
procfs         4.0k    4.0k      0B   100%    /proc
devfs          1.0k    1.0k      0B   100%    /var/named/dev

I install freebsd on /dev/ad2s1g
#cd /usr/
src# make  buildworld
# make  buildkernel KERNCONF=MYKRN
# make installworld DESTDIR=/usr/sharedzone
# make installkernel DESTDIR=/usr/sharedzone KERNCONF=MYKRN
# cd etc && make distribution DESTDIR=/usr/sharedzone

I change /etc/nextboot.conf on /dev/ad2s1a to 
vfs.root.mountfrom="ufs:/dev/ad2s1g"

When I boot( this time it is 0:ad(0,a)/boot/loader ) I get working system:

#mount -p
/dev/ad2s1g             /                       ufs     rw              2 2
devfs                   /dev                    devfs   rw,multilabel   0 0
procfs                  /proc                   procfs  rw              0 0

In this situation kernel is loaded from ad2s1a slice, so

I change config for loader (press space when booting)
and write: 0:ad(0,g)/boot/loader

I get system halted on this stage:
Oct 10 13:52:22  syslogd: kernel boot file is /boot/kernel/kernel

BUG: system can not loaded if root is located not on ***a slice.
